text1.text: ชื่อตำแหน่ง

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, to_snumber(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) as snumber_share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_share_m_constant. share_value_perunit, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name as managername, sysdate as c_date, '!text1_1!' as text1, '!text2_1!' as text2 FROM sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_share_m_constant WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) /*WHERE*/ -- sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = '007909'

r_amnat_member_book_assure_nest.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, decode( sc_dep_m_creditor.monthly_deposit_status , '1' , sc_dep_m_creditor.monthly_deposit_amount , 0 ) as monthly_deposit_amount FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) ORDER BY sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ASC

r_amnat_member_book_assure_nest_loan.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
